Class NeoForgePermissionBridge

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.neoforge.NeoForgePermissionBridge
public final class NeoForgePermissionBridge extends Object
Permission bridge for NeoForge audiences and raw senders.

NeoForge permission checks are node-based, so permission nodes must be registered before PermissionAPI can delegate to installed backends such as LuckPerms. When a node is not yet registered, this bridge falls back to command-level op checks to preserve existing behavior.

    Description

    Adds all previously registered nodes to the NeoForge permission gather event.

    Checks command source permission with an explicit fallback value.

    Checks command source permission using NeoForge PermissionAPI for players and command-level fallback for non-player sources.

  • Method Details

    • register

      public static void register(String permission, int fallbackOpLevel)
      Registers a boolean permission node with the given fallback op level.
      Parameters:
      permission - permission string
      fallbackOpLevel - op level to treat as granted when no permission backend answers

    • addRegisteredNodes

      public static void addRegisteredNodes(Object event)
      Adds all previously registered nodes to the NeoForge permission gather event.
      Parameters:
      event - permission gather event

    • hasPermission

      public static boolean hasPermission(net.minecraft.server.level.ServerPlayer player, String permission, int fallbackOpLevel)
      Checks player permission using NeoForge PermissionAPI when the node is registered and otherwise falls back to command-level permissions.
      Parameters:
      player - player instance
      permission - permission string
      fallbackOpLevel - op level to treat as granted when no permission backend answers
      Returns:
      true when allowed

    • hasPermission

      public static boolean hasPermission(net.minecraft.server.level.ServerPlayer player, String permission, boolean fallbackAllowed)
      Checks player permission using NeoForge PermissionAPI with an explicit fallback value.
      Parameters:
      player - player instance
      permission - permission string
      fallbackAllowed - fallback result when the node is not registered or the backend fails
      Returns:
      true when allowed

    • hasPermission

      public static boolean hasPermission(net.minecraft.commands.CommandSourceStack source, String permission, int fallbackOpLevel)
      Checks command source permission using NeoForge PermissionAPI for players and command-level fallback for non-player sources.
      Parameters:
      source - command source
      permission - permission string
      fallbackOpLevel - op level to treat as granted when no permission backend answers
      Returns:
      true when allowed

    • hasPermission

      public static boolean hasPermission(net.minecraft.commands.CommandSourceStack source, String permission, boolean fallbackAllowed)
      Checks command source permission with an explicit fallback value.
      Parameters:
      source - command source
      permission - permission string
      fallbackAllowed - fallback result when a backend cannot answer
      Returns:
      true when allowed

    • hasPermissionLevel

      public static boolean hasPermissionLevel(net.minecraft.commands.CommandSourceStack source, int fallbackOpLevel)
      Checks command-level permission on a source.
      Parameters:
      source - command source
      fallbackOpLevel - op level to test
      Returns:
      true when granted
